expiration_policy: Re-check before implementation and before any live audit run; these docs are current-planning inputs, not permanent truths.
implementation_rule: Bundle contracts must encode current highest-effort defaults, but runtime providers must capability-probe and record observed provider labels/levels before treating a result as synthesis-eligible.

sources.relevant_claim: model_reasoning_effort and plan_mode_reasoning_effort support xhigh where model-dependent.
Thinking and Pro models expose thinking-effort controls in the ChatGPT model picker; browser labels may drift and must be observed live.
Gemini thinking controls expose high as the highest documented thinking level in API surfaces; browser Deep Think must still be verified in the UI.
Claude Code Opus 4.7 supports effort levels low/medium/high/xhigh/max; max is current-session deepest effort and ultrathink is an in-context one-off deep reasoning request.
Grok 4.3 supports reasoning_effort none/low/medium/high; high is the maximum single-model setting.
DeepSeek V4 supports thinking enabled and reasoning_effort high/max; max is the highest effort.
